---
title: "lineage identification"
author: "Richard J Beck"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/4473331/Documents/projects/021_ltee_models/anaMorph")
```

```{r}

source("R/db_utils.R")

x <- data.table::fread("core_data/passaging.csv")

mani <- data.table::fread("manifests/image_manifest.csv")

db_col <- collapse_db(x)


got_im <- db_col$samples$samples%in%mani$id

im_pass <- unique(db_col$samples$passage_id[got_im])
db_col$passaging$imaged <- db_col$passaging$passage_id%in%im_pass

```

```{r}
p <- unique(as.data.frame(db_col$passaging)[, c("passage_id","passage_from","imaged")], by="passage_id")
p$passage_id <- as.character(p$passage_id)
p$passage_from <- as.character(p$passage_from)

im <- p$passage_id[p$imaged %in% TRUE]
parent_of <- setNames(p$passage_from, p$passage_id)

im_edges <- p[p$imaged %in% TRUE & !is.na(p$passage_from) & p$passage_from %in% im, ]
tips <- setdiff(im, unique(im_edges$passage_from))

lineages <- lapply(tips, function(tip){
  lin <- tip
  cur <- tip
  repeat{
    par <- parent_of[[cur]]
    if(is.null(par) || is.na(par) || !(par %in% im)) break
    lin <- c(lin, par)
    cur <- par
  }
  lin
})

lin_dt <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(lineages), function(i){
  data.frame(lineage_id=i, position=seq_along(lineages[[i]]), passage_id=lineages[[i]], stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
}))

comment_lut <- grepl("LTEE", x$comment)
names(comment_lut) <- x$id
lin_dt$ltee <- comment_lut[lin_dt$passage_id]

lin_dt <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(lin_dt, lin_dt$lineage_id), function(i){
  if(sum(i$ltee, na.rm=TRUE) == 0) return(NULL)
  i
}))

lin_list <- split(lin_dt$passage_id, lin_dt$lineage_id)

keep <- rep(TRUE, length(lin_list))

for(i in seq_along(lin_list)){
  tail_i <- lin_list[[i]][-1]
  if(length(tail_i) == 0) next
  for(j in seq_along(lin_list)){
    if(i == j) next
    if(all(tail_i %in% lin_list[[j]])){
      keep[i] <- FALSE
      break
    }
  }
}

keep_ids <- names(lin_list)[keep]
lin_dt <- lin_dt[lin_dt$lineage_id %in% keep_ids, ]

sample_ids_by_passage <- split(
  as.character(db_col$samples$samples),
  as.character(db_col$samples$passage_id)
)

lineage_objects <- lapply(split(lin_dt, lin_dt$lineage_id), function(lineage_rows) {
  lineage_rows <- lineage_rows[order(lineage_rows$position, decreasing = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
  passage_ids <- as.character(lineage_rows$passage_id)

  passage_manifest <- setNames(lapply(passage_ids, function(passage_id) {
    sample_ids <- sample_ids_by_passage[[passage_id]]
    mani[mani$id %in% sample_ids, , drop = FALSE]
  }), passage_ids)

  list(
    lineage_id = unique(as.character(lineage_rows$lineage_id)),
    passage_ids = passage_ids,
    passages = passage_manifest
  )
})

names(lineage_objects) <- vapply(
  lineage_objects,
  function(lineage_obj) lineage_obj$lineage_id,
  character(1)
)

```
